description:
🕒 14:00–16:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-chokotto-tenranzan-syoka/

Walk with a guide and discover the subtle changes in nature you might miss on a regular walk. This tour is designed to be easy and enjoyable in a short time. Please feel free to join us. Depending on the season, homemade pesticide-free vegetables will be given as a gift!

【Fee】¥2,000 per person, ¥1,500 for returning visitors, ¥4,000 per family (includes guide fee and insurance)

【Maximum participants】10 people

【Guide】Tsubasa Kojima (Hanno City Ecotourism Citizen Guides Association – Wildlife Group)

【What to bring】Drinking water, rain gear, backpack or similar (something that keeps your hands free is recommended), towel
location: 集合 飯能市立博物館前（国際興業バス「OH!!!・天覧山下」または「市民会館・博物館」下車徒歩3分）
